# VLBI SOURCE POSITION CATALOGUE  Format version of 2010.09.11 
# Catalogue was created by Leonid Petrov ( lpetrov@astrogeo )
#                       at 2024.04.12-07:24:39
#                          with using program rfc_fused version of 2022.11.27
#
# This catalogue contains positions and estimates of flux density
# of 21,907 compact radio source from reanalysis of 1086 VLBI experiments
# under 67 absolute astrometry programs at the VLBA, LBA, EVN, and CVN
# in 1994-2023, as well as all VLBI data under geodesy programs since
# 1980.04.11 through 2024.03.11, in total 19,228 experiments. The positions
# were derived from 25 millions of group delays collected in these
# observing sessions.
#
# Home page: http://astrogeo.org/sol/rfc_2024a
#            ============================================
#
# If you use positions and/or estimates of correlated flux densities
# from this catalogue in your work, for example, for scheduling phase
# referencing observations, you are encouraged to include in your paper
# references to original publications:
#
#  1) Beasley, A.J., Gordon, D., Peck, A.B., Petrov, L., MacMillan, D.S.,
